articles.author: Gregory Svirnovskiy
articles.title: Pentagon releases swath of UFO files - Politico
articles.description: The government gave no analysis of the files, suggesting it is up to Americans to draw their own conclusions.
articles.content:
Statements from several government officials suggested this was merely the first tranche of releases, and that more UFO files would be declassified and released at a later date.
